narrative:
Greenville Twp township has 11,519 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
